info.title: E-Commerce API
info.description: Complete backend APIs for E-Commerce system including Auth, Products, Cart, Orders, Payments, Shipment, Reviews, Notifications, Admin

tags.name: Address
tags.description: Endpoints for managing user shipping and billing addresses

tags.name: Inventory
tags.description: Endpoints for managing product stock levels and reservations

tags.name: Search
tags.description: Endpoints for product search, filtering, category-based lookup, and suggestions

tags.name: User
tags.description: Endpoints for managing user profiles, status, and system-wide user administration

tags.name: Seller
tags.description: Endpoints for seller profile management, store analytics, and store operations

tags.name: Authentication
tags.description: Endpoints for user registration, login, and password management

tags.name: Payment
tags.description: Endpoints for processing and verifying customer payments

tags.name: Order
tags.description: Endpoints for managing customer orders and transactions

tags.name: Shipment
tags.description: Endpoints for managing logistics, shipment creation, and real-time tracking

tags.name: Category
tags.description: Endpoints for managing product categories and hierarchy

tags.name: Admin
tags.description: Administrative endpoints for platform-wide user, seller, and product moderation

tags.name: Transaction
tags.description: Endpoints for viewing user and platform financial transactions

tags.name: Product
tags.description: Endpoints for managing products, including search and image uploads

tags.name: Cart
tags.description: Endpoints for managing user shopping carts

tags.name: Review
tags.description: Endpoints for managing product reviews and ratings

get.description: Retrieves a user's basic profile information

put.description: Updates a user's profile information

parameters.name: userId
parameters.description: ID of the user to update

delete.description: Permanently deletes a user's account and information

parameters.name: userId
parameters.description: ID of the user to delete

put.description: Assigns a new role or privilege level to a user account

parameters.name: roleId
parameters.description: ID of the role to assign

put.description: Updates the quantity of a specific item in the cart

delete.description: Removes a specific item from the user's cart

parameters.name: cartItemId
parameters.description: ID of the cart item to remove

get.description: Retrieves details of a specific address for a user

put.description: Updates an existing address record

parameters.name: addressId
parameters.description: ID of the address to update

delete.description: Removes an address from a user's profile

parameters.name: addressId
parameters.description: ID of the address to delete

put.description: Sets a specific address as the default for the user

parameters.name: addressId
parameters.description: ID of the address to set as default

put.description: Updates the current status of a shipment (e.g., Shipped, Delivered)

get.description: Retrieves public or private profile details for a seller

put.description: Updates store information and contact details for a seller

parameters.name: sellerId
parameters.description: ID of the seller to update

put.description: Deactivates a seller's account

parameters.name: sellerId
parameters.description: ID of the seller to deactivate

put.description: Updates an existing review's rating or comment

parameters.name: reviewId
parameters.description: ID of the review to update

delete.description: Removes a review from a product

parameters.name: reviewId
parameters.description: ID of the review to delete

get.description: Retrieves detailed information for a specific product

parameters.name: productId
parameters.description: ID of the product to retrieve

put.description: Updates details of an existing product

parameters.name: productId
parameters.description: ID of the product to update

delete.description: Removes a product from the catalog

parameters.name: productId
parameters.description: ID of the product to delete

put.description: Updates the status of an order (Admin only)
Cancels an existing order if it's in a cancellable state

parameters.name: orderId
parameters.description: ID of the order to cancel

400.description: Order cannot be cancelled in its current state

put.description: Marks a specific notification as read

get.description: Retrieves current stock levels for a specific product

put.description: Sets the absolute stock quantity for a product
Temporarily reserves stock for a product (e.g., during checkout)
Releases previously reserved stock back to available inventory
Increments the stock quantity for a product
Decrements the stock quantity for a product

get.description: Retrieves a single category by its ID

put.description: Updates details of an existing category

parameters.name: categoryId
parameters.description: ID of the category to update

delete.description: Removes a category from the system

parameters.name: categoryId
parameters.description: ID of the category to delete

put.description: Reactivates a previously blocked user account

parameters.name: userId
parameters.description: ID of the user to unblock

put.description: Suspends a user account and prevents login

parameters.name: userId
parameters.description: ID of the user to block

put.description: Rejects a seller application with a reason

parameters.name: sellerId
parameters.description: ID of the seller to reject

put.description: Approves a seller application and enables their store

parameters.name: sellerId
parameters.description: ID of the seller to approve

put.description: Suspends a product listing with a reason

parameters.name: productId
parameters.description: ID of the product to block

put.description: Approves a product listing for public display

parameters.name: productId
parameters.description: ID of the product to approve

post.description: Adds a product to the user's shopping cart

get.description: Retrieves all addresses associated with a specific user

post.description: Adds a new address to a user's profile
Initializes a shipment for an order

get.description: Retrieves the full chronological history of tracking updates for a shipment

post.description: Logs a new location or status update for a shipment's journey
Submits a request to become a seller on the platform

get.description: Retrieves a paginated list of all products with optional category filtering

post.description: Adds a new product to the catalog

get.description: Retrieves a paginated list of reviews for a product

post.description: User adds a rating and comment for a product

get.description: Retrieves all images associated with a product

post.description: Uploads a new image for a specific product
Creates a new payment transaction for an order
Verifies a payment transaction with the payment gateway
Issues a refund for a previously completed payment

get.description: Retrieves a paginated list of all orders (Admin only)

post.description: Places a new order for the products currently in the user's cart

400.description: Invalid order request or empty cart

get.description: Retrieves a paginated list of all inventory records

post.description: Initializes inventory record for a product

get.description: Retrieves a flat list of all categories

post.description: Creates a new root or sub-category
Verifies the user's email address using a valid verification token
Resets the user's password using a valid reset token

parameters.name: token
parameters.description: Password reset token sent via email

post.description: Creates a new user account and sends a verification email

409.description: User with this email already exists

post.description: Uses a valid refresh token to generate a new access token
Invalidates the user's refresh token
Authenticates a user and returns JWT tokens
Sends a password reset link to the user's email

patch.description: Sets the user account status (e.g., Active, Inactive, Blocked)

parameters.name: status
parameters.description: New status for the user account

get.description: Retrieves a paginated list of all users
Retrieves a paginated list of notifications for a user
Retrieves the user's shopping cart and its items
Retrieves details of a specific financial transaction
Retrieves details of a specific shipment
Lists all products belonging to a specific seller
Lists all order items that include products from this seller
Retrieves high-level summary metrics for the seller dashboard
Retrieves store performance metrics for a date range
Finds products matching a specific keyword in title or description
Lists the currently most-viewed or trending products

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of trending items to return

get.description: Provides a list of suggested keywords based on partial input

parameters.name: keyword
parameters.description: Partial keyword to get suggestions for

get.description: Lists products with the highest sales or ratings
Advanced search with multiple filters like price range, rating, and category
Retrieves all products belonging to a specific category
Retrieves an aggregated rating summary for a product
Searches for products based on a keyword
Retrieves a paginated list of products for a specific category
Retrieves the status and details of a specific payment
Retrieves details of a specific order
Retrieves all payment transactions associated with an order
Retrieves shipment details linked to a specific order
Retrieves all items belonging to a specific order
Retrieves a specific item from an order
Retrieves a paginated list of orders for a specific user
Lists products with zero available stock

200.description: Out of stock items retrieved successfully

get.description: Lists products with stock levels below a specified threshold
Retrieves a paginated list of products for a category
Retrieves categories in a hierarchical tree structure
Retrieves a paginated list of all users on the platform
Retrieves a paginated list of all sellers and their status
Retrieves a paginated list of all products for moderation
Administrative view of all system orders
Retrieves platform-wide summary metrics for a date range

delete.description: Removes all items from the user's shopping cart
Removes a specific image from a product

parameters.name: imageId
parameters.description: ID of the image to delete

parameters.name: notificationId
parameters.description: ID of the notification to delete

ApiResponseUser.description: Generic wrapper for all API responses

success.description: Indicates if the operation was successful

message.description: Descriptive message about the operation outcome

data.description: The payload data of the response

CartItemRequest.description: Request to add or update an item in the cart

ReviewUpdateRequest.description: Request to update an existing review

comment.example: Updated: Still good but slightly expensive.

ProductUpdateRequest.description: Request to update an existing product

description.example: Updated description for iPhone 15 Pro Max

ApiResponseProductResponse.description: Generic wrapper for all API responses

success.description: Indicates if the operation was successful

message.description: Descriptive message about the operation outcome

data.description: The payload data of the response

OrderStatusUpdateRequest.description: Request to update the status of an order

OrderItemResponse.description: Response containing details of an item within an order

price.description: Price per unit at the time of order

orderItems.description: List of items in the order

InventoryStockRequest.description: Request to update inventory stock level

quantity.description: Quantity to add/remove (not used in current logic, placeholder)

success.description: Indicates if the operation was successful

success.description: Indicates if the operation was successful

BlockRequest.description: Request to block a user or seller

RejectRequest.description: Request to reject a seller application

reason.example: Invalid GST number or missing documentation

ShipmentCreateRequest.description: Request to create a shipment for an order

TrackingUpdateRequest.description: Request to add a new tracking update

message.description: Tracking message or update

SellerApplyRequest.description: Request to apply for a seller account

userId.description: User ID applying for seller status

ProductCreateRequest.description: Request to create a new product

description.example: Latest Apple iPhone with Titanium design

ReviewRequest.description: Request to submit a product review

userId.description: ID of the user writing the review
